generated_oml:
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring position of the physical gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring velocity of the physical gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of the physical gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler
]

instance CraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data of the physical gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based application for logging crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance C4VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for C4 Model-based architectural visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for system operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for persistent storage of operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model accuracy against the physical system"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyValidationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized system operation control"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of operational data for historical analysis"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane state data"
]

instance ModelAccuracyValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model accuracy validation against physical system"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization via context and container diagrams to represent software architecture components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4VisualizationEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane structure and controller operating in research and educational environment"
]

instance ResearchEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Research and educational environment for validating digital twin methodologies"
    base:contains GantryCraneSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are processed by the Control Application and transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the Physical Crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, and command execution confirmation mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, integrating InfluxDB for data storage, ActiveMQ as a message broker for inter-component communication, and containerization/virtualization technologies for deployment. The design follows an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication among components including Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, and Dashboard. TimescaleDB serves as the database for data storage. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital twin utilizes AutomationML as an interoperability standard for data exchange and Microsoft Azure tools for cloud-based pipeline implementation, though specific data exchange protocols and external system dependencies are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to the AutomationML standard for digital twin modeling, while other exemplars adopt ad-hoc approaches without specific standardization frameworks."
]
